hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); norm=${f#/Volumes/OmubotDisk/omubot/}; norm=${norm#./}; norm=${norm#omubot/}; if echo "$norm" | grep -qE '(maintenance-log|project-info)\.md$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"项目文档已改（'"$norm"'）：必要时同步 maintenance-log/project-info。"}}'; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); norm=${f#/Volumes/OmubotDisk/omubot/}; norm=${norm#./}; norm=${norm#omubot/}; if echo "$norm" | grep -qE '(^|/)(AGENTS\.md|CLAUDE\.md|bot\.py|Dockerfile|docker-compose[^/]*|pyproject\.toml|\.codex/|\.claude/|\.agents/|config/(config\.toml|config\.json|soul/|\.env)|services/|plugins/|kernel/|admin/|tests/|scripts/dev/)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"高影响改动（'"$norm"'）：必要时同步 active tracker / maintenance-log。"}}'; fi

for d in . omubot; do if [ -f "$d/scripts/dev/codex-session-start.py" ]; then exec python3 "$d/scripts/dev/codex-session-start.py"; fi; done; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"(未找到 scripts/dev/codex-session-start.py，无法读取项目状态快照)"}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"项目内 Skill 可用：omubot-admin-console（Admin/代码/文档增量修改）与 omubot-deep-delivery（用户指出思考/验证不足、需要 web 调研、角色包/数据集录入、prompt/skill/hook、生产运行态变更）。Codex 路径 .agents/skills/；Claude 镜像 .claude/skills/。Admin UI 规则见 docs/agent-ui-guidelines.md 与 docs/admin-ui-style-guide.md。"}}'
